title: lepisanthes stipulaceum
intro: Lepisanthes stipulaceum, a species of flowering plant in the family Salicaceae, is commonly known as the velvet-back tree. Native to tropical regions, this plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lepisanthes stipulaceum include its ability to treat fever, reduce pain, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable asset in traditional medicine. Lepisanthes stipulaceum is often prepared as an infusion or decoction for its medicinal uses, and its leaves and bark are commonly used in herbal remedies.
